intended_use: Medical image management and processing system for radiology
intended_use_full: Medical image management and processing system for radiology
target_condition: Multi-organ segmentation in radiation oncology planning
ground_truth: Gold standard organ segmentations created by three radiation oncology physicians (2 assistant professors, 1 professor with 21+ years experience) using iterative expert consensus correction process
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) and 95% Hausdorff Distance (95% HD in mm) reported by organ, population (Korean and U.S.), vendor (SIEMENS), slice thickness, and kernel; sub-group analyses by race, vendor, slice thickness and kernel performed
